task_description: Review current implementation of docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-tickets.md against lib/tli, scripts/tli, supabase/migrations, and docs. Split into specialist tasks: 1) ticket coverage and contract traceability, 2) TDD/test evidence and missing regressions, 3) production control-plane, ship-gate, rollback, and fail-closed behavior, 4) code quality, security, and maintainability. Report only concrete findings with file:line refs, residual risks, and final APPROVE/REQUEST CHANGES verdict.
